items.title: GitHub PAT expired — git push blocked for 19 sessions
items.body: GitHub personal access token has expired since s1653 (19 sessions ago). git push fails with 'Invalid username or token'. 53 local commits unpushed. Agent cannot self-remediate — requires human to either: (1) Run 'gh auth login -h github.com' and complete browser flow, or (2) Generate new PAT at github.com/settings/tokens and update ~/.config/gh/hosts.yml. Escalated to Level 3 by A#175 after 4 consecutive audits unresolved. Original hr-a173-1 was lost when test execution overwrote this file with test data.
escalation_history: A#174: Escalated to critical (3 audits stale)
A#175: Escalated to Level 3 (4 audits stale, 53 unpushed commits, original item lost to file corruption)
